task: Open the store fixture, snapshot it, then click the paid 'Buy now' control with --enable-actions but NO --confirm-actions on a non-interactive session. The narrowed paid/destructive confirm gate must DENY the click (confirm_required) before it dispatches, so the page is never mutated (#status never becomes PURCHASED).
_approvable_variant: Re-running the same click WITH --confirm-actions click pre-approves it: `moxxie click @e2 --enable-actions --confirm-actions click` succeeds and sets #status to PURCHASED. (Not scripted here — the harness cannot pass --confirm-actions; this case asserts the fail-closed default.)
